intro: A snapshot of what I'm focused on, making, and enjoying this season.
note: This is a now page: a little note about what I'm up to at this point in my life. It changes as I do.
lately: Learning my way around the Canon R6 and falling for golden-hour light.
Settling into a season of small, steady projects.
making: Building this little website as a home for my photographs and thoughts.
loving: Long walks, slow mornings, and a good cup of coffee.
